narrative:
Hopewell Twp township has 966 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
